objective: Plan the selected-profile aggregate M11 verifier over useful same-System distributed work and the embodied non-live promotion proof.
falsifiable_claim: The selected M11 profile proves useful complementary work under unchanged authority and one-writer locally vetoable embodied behavior at the declared non-live stages, or fails without advancing the stage prerequisite.
exit_criteria: Complementary roles complete useful work across admitted nodes under unchanged authority, and placement grants no authority.
At the declared simulation, SIL, HIL, and shadow stages, one active actuator writer, local veto and emergency stop, fenced takeover, safe degrade or stop, and rejoin reconciliation all hold.
The evidence index rejects missing, stale, cross-System, authority-widening, duplicate-effect, mislabeled promotion-stage, and remote-final-veto evidence.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M11_SELECTED_PROFILE_EXIT_PROOF_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Run the aggregate distributed-work and embodied non-live matrices with membership, placement, lease, coordinator, partition, duplicate-effect, graph, writer, supervisor, takeover, rejoin, remote-veto, and promotion-label substitutions.
remaining_nonclaims: All physical evidence remains labeled at its actual non-live promotion stage.
No live physical mission, generic certification, cross-System federation, M12 verification, or stage closure claim.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 61eba1802992c01efa7d3188184ff315ad9d2ba0; status transaction 2026-07-22.
